projects.name: Private Residence, East Legon
projects.description: Full living and dining fit-out for a 5-bedroom home. Custom upholstered sofas, solid mahogany dining suite, and built-in bedroom cabinetry throughout.

projects.name: Corporate Headquarters, Takoradi
projects.description: Executive suites, open-plan workstations and boardroom furniture across three floors. Dark walnut veneer throughout.

projects.name: Boutique Hotel, Kumasi
projects.description: 24 bedroom suites fully furnished to a five-star brief. Upholstered headboards, custom wardrobe units and vanity tables in every room.

projects.name: Penthouse Suite, Airport Hills
projects.description: Bespoke kitchen cabinetry and island unit for a high-rise penthouse. Lacquered hardwood with integrated appliance housings.

projects.name: Restaurant Dining Room, Osu
projects.description: 48-seat restaurant fit-out with bespoke dining tables, banquette seating and a custom host stand. Warm mahogany paired with leather upholstery.

projects.name: Law Firm, Ridge, Accra
projects.description: Partner offices, client meeting rooms and reception area. Sober, authoritative palette — ebony veneer, brass hardware, dark upholstery.

projects.name: Family Villa, Trasacco Valley
projects.description: Seven-bedroom family home complete from master suite to children's rooms and a double garage fitted with custom workshop storage.

projects.name: Conference Centre, Takoradi
projects.description: 200-seat conference hall with tiered seating, podium furniture, breakout room tables and a full reception suite.
